title: IntentRefinement
description: A recorded delta when an Intent's formulation is refined during guided discovery (agency/capabilities/discover/ontology.py; Spec 153 Slice 6 — discover-prompt wave). Links REFINES→Intent; captures the before/after diff so the evolution is auditable.

trigger.description: What prompted the refinement — a clarification answer, a feasibility finding, or an explicit user edit.

before.description: The Intent formulation (purpose + deliverable + acceptance) before the refinement.

after.description: The Intent formulation after the refinement.
